C-1.description: Run tests/run-all.sh and report pass/fail counts; publish any regressions as bus events

C-2.description: Run examples/minimal-harness/run.sh and examples/multi-agent/run.sh — verify both complete cleanly

C-3.description: Scan lib/ and hooks/ for abstraction quality: duplicated logic, missing error handling, functions doing too many things — report findings but do NOT change function signatures or public API

C-4.description: Check that all files/functions referenced in AGENTS.md and docs/ exist — flag any drift between docs and code

C-5.description: Publish cycle summary via bus_publish; update MEMORY.md with findings and regression count
